uk-legal.title: UK Legal
uk-legal.description: UK case law (TNA Find Case Law), legislation (legislation.gov.uk), Hansard, Bills, Parliamentary Votes, Committees, HMRC guidance, and OSCOLA citation parsing.

bailii.title: BAILII
bailii.description: British and Irish Legal Information Institute — full-text case law search and judgment retrieval. Must run locally (BAILII blocks cloud IPs).

govuk.title: GOV.UK
govuk.description: GOV.UK content, guidance, organisations, and postcode-to-local-authority lookup.

uk-due-diligence.title: UK Due Diligence
uk-due-diligence.description: Companies House, Charity Commission, HMLR Land Registry, The Gazette (insolvency notices), and HMRC VAT register.

whatdotheyknow.title: WhatDoTheyKnow
whatdotheyknow.description: WhatDoTheyKnow FOI request data — search and read public Freedom of Information requests and responses.

property.title: UK Property
property.description: UK property data — comparable sales, EPC certificates, rental yields, SDLT calculations, planning search, and property report generation.
